calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lawrence Murray, Esq. 415-240-2382 for Plaintiff.
Joel Jacobs, Esq. 510-559-0082, Deputy Attorney General for Defendant/Appellant State of California.
Alexandra Hall, Defendant via Zoom
Kyle Hitchens, Defendant via Zoom.

10:04am
Trial de Novo is held. The Court allows Alexandra Hall and Kyle Hitchens to appear via Zoom. The Court states he has reviewed all documents and exhibits from parties and had a brief talk with Counsel off the record.

Mr. Lawrence Murray, on behalf of the Plaintiff presents opening statements.
10:20am Mr. Jacobs on behalf of the Defendant/Appellant addresses Mr. Murray.
10:25am Mr. Kyle Hitchens is sworn, examined and testifies.
10:29am Ms. Alexandra Hall is sworn, examined and testifies.
10:42am Mr. Jacobs on behalf of the Defense presents arguments.
Defendant Exhibit G - check for $13,000 dollars is identified and admitted.
10:47am The Court comments regarding 2 issues in dispute.
10:50am Mr. Jacobs, on behalf of the Defendant presents electronic evidence - application for additional rental assistance for $3300 to Mr. Murray. Mr. Jacobs presents further arguments.
11:03am Ms. Lorrie Blevins testifies on behalf of the Defendant.
11:04am Mr. Hitchens presents further testimony.
11:07am Mr. Murray, on behalf of the Plaintiff presents closing statements.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Judgment is affirmed. (see scanned judgment - small claims appeal order for details)

All exhibits are returned to submitting parties.

Judge: Victor M. Hwang, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (210)

11:14am Court is adjourned.
